title: Copper Skillet Tunisian Cheese Bake
description: A rich and savory dish featuring melted cheese baked to perfection in a copper skillet.
instructions: Place the Tunisian cheese in the copper skillet.
Sprinkle the molten cheese on top of the Tunisian cheese.
Add a pinch of bake, if desired.
Place the skillet in the oven and bake for 10-12 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove the skillet from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes.
Serve the cheese bake hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
